supportLevel: Unofficial public Microsoft Fabric status mirror based on HTML scraping

active.detailsHtml: Fabric Customers may experience intermittent delays in accessing service. Engineers are investigating the issue and an update will be provided soon.
active.detailsText: Fabric Customers may experience intermittent delays in accessing service. Engineers are investigating the issue and an update will be provided soon.

active.detailsHtml: Power BI customers whose tenants are located in the West US region may encounter issues accessing Publish to Web reports. Engineers are investigating the issue and an update will be provided soon.
